summary:
The protein asporin has no documented association with disease according to the available scientific literature. Confusion may arise from phonetic resemblance to other proteins such as aspartoacylase, which is linked to Canavan disease; however, these are distinct entities unrelated to asporin.  

\boxed{\text{B}}

\boxed{\text{B}}. Answer choice: B
